docs.description: Proof of concept session guide — Sonos zone picker, iHeart search/browse/playback, favorites. Pre-session checklist, Flask routes, SwiftUI screens, iHeart and Sonos API notes.
Full product context — architecture, stack, features, brand, design principles, marketing positioning, and decision log. Source of truth for all sessions.
Complete feature reference across 10 product areas. Every feature in user-action language with configurable items, status, priority, and audio quality context.
Feature-by-feature comparison vs Roon with Sorriva positioning response. 11 Sorriva advantages, 2 honest gaps, 7 parity features.
Lossless vs hi-res explained. Streaming service quality table. Sorriva delivery path matrix by protocol and hardware.
Cross-product session conventions — start checklist, iteration workflow, session close, zip spec, manifest schemas, rollback, Hub workflow.
Canonical schemas and path reference for roadmap-data.json, docs-manifest.json, web-assets.json, deploy-manifest.json, and deploy zip construction.
